title: Edith Cross
compiled_truth: Edith Cross is an Enron employee at [Enron](companies/enron). Over the corpus period (2000-02-23 to 2002-02-21), Edith Cross sent 20 and received 148 emails, totalling 168 interactions. Top correspondents: [V Weldon](people/v-weldon) (5), [Berney Aucoin](people/berney-aucoin) (3), [Neil Bresnan](people/neil-bresnan) (3), [Chris Stokley](people/chris-stokley) (3), [Kenneth Lee](people/kenneth-lee) (3).
